summary: Improves restart diagnostics and hardens the local restart handoff used after one-click updates.
updatePrompt: Update Planban from piercekearns/planban, verify the plugin and MCP tools are available, then reopen Planban in the Codex in-app browser.
changelogSummary: Planban now records restart handoff logs and starts the refreshed local app through the same launcher path used by the plugin, making failed restarts visible and easier to recover.
